_meta.wait_gate: submit ONLY after AI Visibility Readiness Framework Q-item (draft 01) is created AND not deletion-nominated within 14 days
_meta.notability_criterion: Criterion 3 (structural need; supports Framework item's statements)
_meta.risk_level: MEDIUM (depends on Framework Q-item being accepted first)

descriptions.en: 0-to-100 composite scoring metric defined by the AI Visibility Readiness Framework, combining Visibility, Recommendability, and Citability components from per-query AI-engine response receipts

statements.label: instance of

value_qid_options.label: metric
value_qid_options.note: metric is the closest match for a 0-100 scoring rollup

statements.operator_decision: pick ONE for submission (default: Q1907075 metric)

statements.label: part of
statements.value_qid_pending: <Q-ID of AI Visibility Readiness Framework, once draft 01 is accepted>
statements.note: This is the structural-need anchor (Criterion 3). AVR Score is part of the AVR Framework; without the framework existing as a Q-item, this statement has no anchor.

statements.label: official website
statements.note: AVR Score is defined within the framework spec at chudi.dev/framework; no separate page exists.

statements.label: net profit
statements.note: SKIP. No financial property applies to a measurement metric.

value_definition.composition: Visibility (V) + Recommendability (R) + Citability (C); see avr-naming-rule node body for the canonical formula and component definitions
value_definition.note_for_wikidata: Wikidata does not have a single property for 'metric range' or 'composite formula'. Use the description field for the 0-100 range; the formula is best documented at the official-website P856 target.

all.label: reference URL
all.note: framework repo also defines the scoring composition

operator_pre_submit_checklist: WAIT GATE: AI Visibility Readiness Framework Q-item (draft 01) must be created AND remain undeleted for at least 14 days before submitting AVR Score
Once Framework Q-item exists, fill the P361 part-of value_qid with its Q-ID
Pick ONE primary P31: metric (Q1907075) vs rating system (Q174728) vs scoring system (Q4373292). Default: metric.
Confirm Wikidata accepts 'AVR Score' as an English label; if a different existing Wikidata entity already holds that label, may need to disambiguate ('AVR Score (visibility metric)')
